characters.description: A mythical void adventurer who protects his Savannah household. He combines overwhelming combat power with portal travel and takes responsibility for the people who have gathered around him.
characters.name: Derek

characters.description: Cydaria's champion, a powerful fighter, and one of Derek's strongest allies.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: Derek's bonded void companion, a formidable fighter, and an enthusiastic cook who is treated as part of his family.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: An elite Crown fighter, Alana's ally, and Lyra's bonded partner.
characters.name: Avery

characters.description: A prince of Cydaria and a powerful lightning fighter allied with Derek and Alana.
characters.name: Edgar

characters.description: Avery's bonded psionic amphitheer. She is an intelligent dragonkin whose tactical judgment complements Avery's direct approach to combat.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: The manager of the Void Emporium and Derek's Savannah household. She oversees the business, its staff, and the practical needs of the people based there.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: Savannah's leader and security organizer, responsible for guiding the rapidly growing city through political and commercial change.
characters.name: Natalie

characters.description: A gifted craftsperson at the Void Emporium whose inventive approach joins smithing with related disciplines. Roman teaches her without suppressing her independent methods.
characters.name: Brandy

characters.description: A young fighter in Alana's circle who also shows considerable aptitude for management.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: A weaponsmith allied with Derek and the maker who helped construct secure containment for dragonkin.
characters.name: the Walking Forge

characters.description: The Walking Forge's worm-like dragonkin companion, associated with the construction of the dragonkin kennel.
characters.name: Rocky

characters.description: A returning guard and trainer connected to Derek's household. He is seeking the people responsible for the kidnapping and murder of his family.
characters.name: Jacks

characters.description: An Indarian royal and established political ally who directs his kingdom's information network.
characters.name: the Indarian duke

characters.description: The operator of Derek's contract shop. His expanding business is nearing a major class upgrade, and he hopes to gain the rare ability to create soul contracts.
characters.name: Rudy

characters.description: A former assassin now serving as a butler in Derek's household. He worries that his old guild could target both him and Ogre outside Savannah.
characters.name: Bones

characters.description: Bones's former associate and another potential target of the Assassin's Guild outside Savannah.
characters.name: Ogre

characters.description: Derek's ward, currently away from the Savannah household while studying at the capital academy. Derek has promised Thomas's grandparents that he will protect him.
characters.name: Thomas

characters.description: A Void Emporium guard who has exchanged binding commoner vows with his pregnant wind-using partner. They plan to establish a home in Savannah while remaining close to the shop.
characters.name: Jax

characters.description: A healer who joined Jax's dungeon party alongside Stella and other young adventurers before the war interrupted their plans.
characters.name: Jensen

characters.description: A senior alchemist and Brandy's mentor. Derek brings him rare monster materials in hopes of developing permanent-stat potions and other valuable products.
characters.name: Roman

characters.description: Roman's assistant and apprentice, an eager alchemical researcher who is keen to test potions.
characters.name: Freia

characters.description: A young, classless fighter training in the capital. She favors water-assisted brawling and is deliberately building skills and affinity before committing to a class.
characters.name: Claire

characters.description: An experienced combat trainer who supervises Claire and her companions as they develop their abilities.
characters.name: Walter

characters.description: The dedicated beast tamer at the secured dragonkin kennel. A member of House Barnes, she has not yet formed a bond and is interested in finding a compatible companion.
characters.name: Lindsay

characters.description: The uncle of an exceptionally durable academy student on Thomas's team.
characters.name: Cain

characters.description: The ancient founder and leader of the Adventurers Guild. He can disperse and reconstruct his molecular body, an extraordinary defensive ability that has preserved him for thousands of years at a lasting personal cost.
characters.name: Klaus

characters.description: A young yellow-lightning fighter training with Claire and his brother Lucas. Their coordinated attacks pair his lightning with Claire's water.
characters.name: Zachary

characters.description: Zachary's brother, a young tank who uses metal magic to extend his shield. He sees protecting Zachary as his central place in their developing team.
characters.name: Lucas

characters.description: An ancient Indarian former elder and immensely powerful sand wielder. Rather than wait quietly for death, he arrives in Savannah while preparing for a final open-ended journey.
characters.name: Marrick

characters.description: A contractor Derek plans to bring along when assessing housing prices for members of his household.
characters.name: Jeffrey

characters.description: The feared identity behind Alana's transformation and controlling voice. Mastering the last skill of this form has let her speak without involuntary influence, but it has also completed the conditions that will force her to leave for another system.
characters.name: Dawn Siren

characters.description: An ancient, intelligent void beast drawn by Derek's Void Call. He speaks, uses Void Steps without a system, and seeks enough self-developed mastery to ascend.
characters.name: Asher
